summary: Immediate RRA call now to recover missed 08:30 CAT and book a 30-minute discovery/demo this week.
reasoning: This is the highest-impact overdue revenue task; it is within Kigali business hours and the scheduled 08:30 CAT call was missed. The sales agent is idle—execute the call now to advance the deal.

task.title: RRA follow-up: call now (Kigali business hours) and secure 30-minute discovery/demo
task.description:
1) Review CRM/account notes and verify whether last night's follow-up email was sent; if not, send it now to the primary contact (cc known stakeholders) proposing three 30-minute Kigali-time slots within the next 3 business days, with a clear agenda, one-pager, and relevant case study.
2) Call the primary contact immediately; if unreachable, leave voicemail (if available) and within 10 minutes attempt an alternate via the RRA switchboard.
3) On live contact, confirm needs, stakeholders, decision process, timeline, and any procurement/compliance requirements; handle objections; aim to book the 30-minute discovery/demo and send a calendar invite.
4) Log all attempts, emails, and outcomes in the CRM; either book the meeting or schedule the next follow-up within 48 hours with blockers noted.
5) If numbers are invalid or email bounces, flag specific gaps for enrichment and hand off to the research agent.
6) Post a brief status update immediately after the call attempts; deadline: within 60 minutes.
